examples: Sally was used to hearing his complaints, usually in the form of disjointed, drunken ramblings.
In disjointed and trembling syllables the man gave the information desired.
If Sid really managed to make anything out of Tom's disjointed mutterings, he kept it to himself.
Before Smell-O-Vision, other motion pictures had unsuccessfully tried to use aromas in disjointed and haphazard ways.
The road from success at 14 years old to adult stardom is long and disjointed.
